# Third-Party Licenses

NexUSB bundles the following third-party tools, unmodified, from the
Ubuntu/Debian archive. Each keeps its own license. The tool name links
directly to its authoritative upstream license; no license text is copied here.

- [ClamAV](https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav/blob/main/COPYING.txt) - GPL-2.0 License
- [chkrootkit](https://www.chkrootkit.org/) - BSD-2-Clause License
- [TestDisk / PhotoRec](https://github.com/cgsecurity/testdisk/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [GNU ddrescue](https://www.gnu.org/software/ddrescue/) - GPL-3.0-or-later License
- [GParted](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gparted/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [util-linux (fdisk)](https://github.com/util-linux/util-linux/blob/master/README.licensing) - GPL-2.0-or-later License (mixed)
- [GNU parted](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/parted.git/tree/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later License
- [smartmontools](https://github.com/smartmontools/smartmontools/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [Nmap](https://github.com/nmap/nmap/blob/master/LICENSE) - Nmap Public Source License (NPSL)
- [netcat (OpenBSD)](https://salsa.debian.org/debian/netcat-openbsd) - BSD-3-Clause License
- [tcpdump / libpcap](https://github.com/the-tcpdump-group/tcpdump/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-3-Clause License
- [OpenSSH](https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/blob/master/LICENCE) - BSD-style (OpenSSH) License
- [Remmina](https://gitlab.com/Remmina/Remmina/-/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [TigerVNC](https://github.com/TigerVNC/tigervnc/blob/master/LICENCE.TXT) - GPL-2.0 License
- [xrdp](https://github.com/neutrinolabs/xrdp/blob/devel/COPYING) - Apache-2.0 License
- [Openbox](http://openbox.org/) - GPL-2.0 License
- [LXDM](https://github.com/lxde/lxdm/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-3.0 License
- [LXTerminal](https://github.com/lxde/lxterminal/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [PCManFM](https://github.com/lxde/pcmanfm/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [Mozilla Firefox](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/) - MPL-2.0 License
- [GNU Midnight Commander](https://github.com/MidnightCommander/mc/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-3.0 License
- [GNU nano](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/nano.git/tree/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later License
- [htop](https://github.com/htop-dev/htop/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [Vim](https://github.com/vim/vim/blob/master/LICENSE) - Vim License (charityware, GPL-compatible)
- [PyGObject (python3-gi)](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pygobject/-/blob/master/COPYING) - LGPL-2.1-or-later License
- [GTK 3](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/-/blob/main/COPYING) - LGPL-2.1-or-later License
- [NetworkManager](https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/NetworkManager/NetworkManager/-/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later License
- [dialog](https://invisible-island.net/dialog/) - LGPL-2.1 License
- [Papirus icon theme](https://github.com/PapirusDevelopmentTeam/papirus-icon-theme/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-3.0 License
- [DejaVu fonts](https://github.com/dejavu-fonts/dejavu-fonts/blob/master/LICENSE) - Bitstream Vera License (+ public domain)
- [Liberation fonts](https://github.com/liberationfonts/liberation-fonts/blob/main/LICENSE) - SIL OFL-1.1 License
- [ImageMagick](https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/blob/main/LICENSE) - ImageMagick License (Apache-2.0-style)
- [GNU Wget](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/wget.git/tree/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later License
